name: polyrig
description: Universal AI harness pack protocol and context assembly system. `npx polyrig install` stages the runtime and installs the /polyrig, /polyrig-pack-author, and /polyrig-pack-install skills for your local agent platforms (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, OpenCode).

scripts.test: node scripts/test-link-skill.mjs && node scripts/test-build-pack-index.mjs && node scripts/test-validate-pack-evidence.mjs && node scripts/test-validate-pack-verify-tools.mjs && node scripts/test-validate-pack-skills.mjs && node scripts/test-validate-group.mjs && node scripts/test-pack-group.mjs && node scripts/test-validate-artifacts.mjs && node scripts/test-install-pack.mjs && node scripts/test-inject-pack-skills.mjs
